title: cattleya × johnstoniana
intro: Cattleya × johnstoniana, also known as the Johnston's cattleya, is a hybrid orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cattleya × johnstoniana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
